title: Avoid peak crowd windows
summary: Identify the busiest hours and plan travel during lower-density slots.

sections.heading: Check the forecast first
sections.body: Use the Crowd Forecast page to compare latest-day and 24-month patterns before heading out.

sections.heading: Aim for mid-morning travel
sections.body: Historical data shows lower load between late morning and early afternoon on most lines.

title: Use the live map effectively
summary: Track active trains and spot route coverage with the live map view.

sections.heading: Watch active trains
sections.body: Zoom into the corridor you care about and use the live train count to confirm service availability.

sections.heading: Compare with trends
sections.body: Pair the live map with Trend Lab to understand which stations consistently spike.

title: Plan trips by station
summary: Use station profiles to jump into forecast and live map workflows.

sections.heading: Search the station directory
sections.body: Filter by station name or state to quickly find the hub you need.

sections.heading: Save links for later
sections.body: Use the station detail page as a launchpad to forecast and live views.
